en: look come on uncle phil i mean i'm sure you did something like this when you were a kid
ko: 봐, 이봐, 필 아저씨, 어릴 때 이런 거 해본 적 있잖아.

en: i think you two owe hillary an apology your behavior tonight cost her an invitation to
join the diamond league and meet some nice young men and you know how much that meant to me
ko: 오늘 밤 너희 행동 때문에 그녀는 다이아몬드 리그 초대를 받지 못했어, 그리고 그게 나에게 얼마나 중요한 일이었는지 알잖아!

en: i mean her it's okay daddy the more time i spent with those women the more i realized
ko: 괜찮아, 아빠. 그 여성들과 시간을 보낼수록 그들이 내 스타일이 아니라는 걸 깨달았어.

en: they're not my kind of people i don't have anything to do with them oh honey i am so proud of you
mrs de winter hillary darling why did you run off like that i wanted to invite you to join
the diamond league i'd love to switching entertainment like that what an outrageous
idea say my mother's turning 90 are they available for birthday parties
ko: 내 어머니가 90세가 되시는데, 그들은 생일에 참석할 수 있어?
